title: mentha riparia var. acuta
intro: Mentha riparia var. acuta, commonly known as American watermint, is a variety of the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a digestive aid, reduce inflammation, and ease respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mentha riparia var. acuta include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving oral health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
